feed.title: the0cp
feed.subtitle: Jigsaw falling into place. So there is nothing to explain.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 7&#58 Expression Descriptor and Register

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 7&#58 Expression Descriptor and Register

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. We need a mechanism to delay emitting bytecode until we know exactly where the data lives. We need a way to describe an expression's state while it is still in transit.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 6&#58 Single-Pass Pratt Parsing

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 6&#58 Single-Pass Pratt Parsing

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. In a single-pass architecture, we do not build an AST. There are no intermediate tree nodes sitting in memory. Instead, we read a token, figure out what it means in its context, and emit the bytecode for it right then and there.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 5&#58 Disassembler

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 5&#58 Disassembler

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. This part will inplement a Disassembler for easy debugging.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 4&#58 Bytecode and Chunk

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 4&#58 Bytecode and Chunk

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. This part will define set of instructions and build Chunks in VM.

entry.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 3&#58 Lexical Analysis and Keywords

link.title: Building a Register VM Interpreter - Part 3&#58 Lexical Analysis and Keywords

entry.summary: This guide is about building a register-based VM interpreter from scratch. It's time for us to turn to the front-end if the interpreter, transforming raw source code into the executable instructions.
